case_title: THOMPSON, DAVID vs. LEE, CHARLES IND & DBA DISCOUNT GROCERS/SLIDERS et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHARLES IND & DBA DISCOUNT GROCERS/SLIDERS LEE, MAY IND & DBA DISCOUNT GROCERS/SLIDERS
